narrative:
Fairview Park-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,187 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.9 percentage points.
